other_observers: Mark Peterson, Brad Steger, Kara Lewantowicz, Bill Maynard, Allan Burns and his wife Tresa.; Ken Pals reported this bird on 3/25/2006.
description: A flycatcher, that was black on the head and white below. See photo.Behaviors: Perching on the yellow gate, at the sewer ponds. Looking for bugs over the water.Call: loud pipping sound, made in flightPlumage: adult
